# google-sites-clone

> Clone any Google Sites page to static HTML. Two-pass pipeline: SingleFile for CSS/images + Puppeteer for clean content.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/maximosovsky/google-sites-clone/blob/main/README.md): Quick start, features, tech stack
- [ROADMAP](https://github.com/maximosovsky/google-sites-clone/blob/main/ROADMAP.md): Development phases and decisions
- [ARCHITECTURE](https://github.com/maximosovsky/google-sites-clone/blob/main/ARCHITECTURE.md): Mermaid diagrams and system design
- [MANUAL](https://github.com/maximosovsky/google-sites-clone/blob/main/MANUAL.md): User manual for CLI and web UI

## Usage

```bash
npx google-sites-clone https://sites.google.com/view/your-site
```

Web UI: [gsclone.osovsky.com](https://gsclone.osovsky.com) — sign in with Google, paste URL, get ZIP by email.

## CLI Options

```
gsclone <url> [options]

  -o, --output <dir>   Output directory (default: ./clone)
  --no-images          Skip image localization
  --no-youtube         Skip YouTube thumbnail download
  --serve              Start local server after build
  --custom-nav         Use custom sidebar navigation
  --inline             Keep images inline (base64)
  --zip                Create ZIP archive after build
```

## Pipeline

1. **Crawl** (`lib/crawl.js`): Opens the Google Sites URL with Puppeteer, parses sidebar navigation links (`li[role="treeitem"] a, nav a`), discovers all pages, generates `page-map.json` with titles, URLs, depth, and slugified filenames. Supports Cyrillic transliteration.

2. **SingleFile** (`lib/singlefile.js`): Runs `single-file` CLI on each page URL. Captures full CSS, base64-encoded images, and layout. Skips already-downloaded pages. Auto-installs SingleFile CLI on first run (~30 MB). 3-second pause between pages.

3. **Puppeteer batch** (`lib/puppeteer.js`): Extracts content in batches of 5 pages. For each page: navigates, waits for `section.yaqOZd` selector, scrolls to trigger lazy loading (40 iterations), extracts all `<section>` elements. Replaces `<iframe>` with `data-iframe-src` placeholder divs. SPA fallback for pages that fail direct URL loading. 60-second pause between batches.

4. **Image localization** (`lib/images.js`): Matches Google CDN URLs from Puppeteer content with base64 images from SingleFile by position. Decodes base64 to local files (`images/img0001.jpg`). Replaces CDN URLs in content HTML. Skips images smaller than 200 bytes.

5. **Video** (`lib/video.js`): Scans `_content/` HTML for YouTube, Vimeo, Google Drive iframes. Downloads thumbnails (YouTube: maxresdefault.jpg 1280×720, fallback hqdefault.jpg 480×360; Vimeo: vumbnail.com). Saves to `site/thumbnails/`.

6. **Build** (`lib/build.js`): Generates `index.html` with sidebar navigation + iframe. Copies SingleFile pages. Injects CSS Grid of video thumbnails into SF pages (inline styles, `all:initial` isolation). Generates `sitemap.xml`, `robots.txt`. Links `report.html` from footer.

7. **Report** (`lib/report.js`): Generates `report.html` — per-page comparison dashboard showing SingleFile vs Puppeteer status, video embed counts, thumbnail download status.

## SaaS API (Vercel Serverless)

```
site/api/
├── _session.js             ← HMAC session helper
├── _r2.js                  ← Cloudflare R2 upload/download (S3 SDK)
├── _email.js               ← Resend email helper
├── _redis.js               ← Upstash Redis client (rate limiting)
├── _ratelimit.js           ← Rate limit + GitHub star check logic
├── auth-google.js          ← Redirect → Google OAuth consent
├── auth-google-callback.js ← Exchange code → set session cookie
├── auth-github.js          ← Redirect → GitHub OAuth
├── auth-github-callback.js ← Exchange code → set session cookie
├── auth-me.js              ← GET current user + clone counts + starred
├── auth-logout.js          ← Clear session cookie
├── clone.js                ← POST → rate limit check → trigger Actions → email
├── upload.js               ← POST webhook → send "ready" email
└── download.js             ← GET → presigned R2 download URL
```

## Usage Tiers

| Tier | Auth | Clones | Max ZIP |
|------|------|--------|---------|
| Free | Google OAuth | 1 total | 250 MB |
| Starred | Google + GitHub + ⭐ repo | 5/day, 20/month | 250 MB (~5 GB/month) |
| Unlimited | Email offer only ($99/month) | ∞ | ∞ |

- Clone count tracked in Upstash Redis (key: `clones:{email}`)
- Star check: GitHub API `GET /user/starred/maximosovsky/google-sites-clone`
- Star status cached in Redis (`starred:{email}`) with 7-day recheck
- Unlimited tier offered via email when Starred user exhausts monthly limit

## R2 Lifecycle Rules (auto-cleanup)

| Prefix | Auto-delete after |
|--------|------------------|
| `zips/` | 7 days |
| `previews/` | 7 days |
| `reports/` | 360 days |

## File Structure

```
google-sites-clone/
├── bin/gsclone.js          # CLI entry point (Commander.js)
├── lib/
│   ├── index.js            # Pipeline orchestrator
│   ├── crawl.js            # Step 1: Auto-crawl navigation
│   ├── singlefile.js       # Step 2: SingleFile pass
│   ├── puppeteer.js        # Step 3: Puppeteer batch extraction
│   ├── images.js           # Step 4: Base64 → local images
│   ├── video.js            # Step 5: YouTube/Vimeo thumbnails
│   ├── build.js            # Step 6: Merge + video grid + nav
│   ├── report.js           # Clone report dashboard
│   ├── deploy.js           # GitHub Pages deploy
│   └── zip.js              # ZIP archive creation
├── rebuild.js              # Quick rebuild from cache
├── site/
│   ├── index.html          # Landing page (gsclone.osovsky.com)
│   ├── style.css           # Design system
│   ├── vercel.json         # API rewrites
│   └── api/                # Vercel serverless functions
├── pipeline.html           # Visual pipeline architecture
├── ARCHITECTURE.md
├── MANUAL.md
├── ROADMAP.md
├── llms.txt                # LLM summary
├── llms-full.txt           # LLM full reference (this file)
└── package.json
```

## Dependencies

- `puppeteer` ^22.0.0 — headless Chrome for crawling and content extraction
- `commander` ^12.0.0 — CLI argument parsing
- `single-file-cli` (auto-installed) — full-page capture with CSS and base64 images
- `@aws-sdk/client-s3` — Cloudflare R2 uploads
- `@upstash/redis` — rate limit counters

## Key Technical Details

- Google Sites uses SPA architecture — direct URL loading may fail for subpages
- SPA fallback: if a page fails to load directly, navigate from home and click sidebar links
- Puppeteer targets `section.yaqOZd` — Google Sites' content section class
- SingleFile captures CSS that Puppeteer cannot (inline styles, computed styles, fonts)
- Image matching is positional (CDN URL #1 maps to base64 image #1)
- Slugification supports Cyrillic → Latin transliteration for filenames
- iframe-based navigation: index.html = sidebar + iframe, pages load inside iframe
- Video grid uses `all:initial` CSS reset to isolate from SingleFile styles
- Auth: HMAC-signed cookies (HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Lax, 30 days)
- GitHub Actions runs full pipeline (avoids Vercel serverless timeout limits)
- R2 uploads via `aws s3 cp` (supports files up to 1 GB, limited to 250 MB for Free/Starred)

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Service |
|----------|---------|
| GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET | Google Cloud Console |
| GITHUB_CLIENT_ID, GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET | GitHub Developer Settings |
| JWT_SECRET | Random 32+ char string |
| R2_ACCOUNT_ID, R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID, R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY | Cloudflare R2 |
| R2_BUCKET | Bucket name (e.g. gsclone) |
| UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL, UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN | Upstash Redis |
| RESEND_API_KEY, RESEND_FROM | Resend |
| WEBHOOK_SECRET | Shared secret for Actions → upload |
| GITHUB_TOKEN | GitHub PAT for workflow dispatch |
